reports.title: claw-code

reports.title: awesome-design-md

reports.title: career-ops

reports.title: graphify
reports.summary: 将代码文件夹、文档、论文、图片、视频或YouTube链接转化为可查询知识图谱的AI编程助手技能。
reports.content: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, Trae). Turn any folder of code, docs, papers, images, videos, or YouTube links into a queryable knowledge graph.

reports.title: openclaude
reports.summary: 开源的AI编程Agent CLI，支持OpenAI、Gemini、DeepSeek、Ollama、Codex、GitHub Models及200+通过OpenAI兼容API的模型。
reports.content: Open Claude Is Open-source coding-agent CLI for OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Ollama, Codex, GitHub Models, and 200+ models via OpenAI-compatible APIs.

reports.title: NemoClaw
reports.summary: 在NVIDIA OpenShell中更安全地运行OpenClaw，提供托管推理服务。
reports.content: Run OpenClaw more securely inside NVIDIA OpenShell with managed inference. Built in TypeScript.

reports.title: caveman
reports.summary: 用穴居人语言风格编写Claude Code技能，节省65%的token用量。
reports.content: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman. Built in Python.

reports.title: claude-code
reports.summary: 原汁原味的Claude Code可运行版本，TypeScript类型全修复，企业级可靠性，可直接bun i启动。
reports.content: 原汁原昧 Claude Code 可运行,可构建, 可调试版; Typescript 类型全修复; 企业级可靠性; 安全无毒, lock 文件保真, 可直接 bun i; bun run dev 启动。Built in TypeScript.

reports.title: OpenCLI
reports.summary: 通用CLI工具和AI原生运行时，将任何网站、Electron应用或本地程序转化为标准化命令行接口。
reports.content: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
